message.content: {"items":[{"title":"Media, Public Opinion and Political Change in the GDR – A Longitudinal Survey, 1985-1990","url_or_doi":"https://doi.org/10.4232/1.13729","justification":"Includes repeated surveys in the GDR in the mid‑ to late‑1980s focusing on media use, public opinion, and political change; directly matches media-related research in the GDR during the 1980s."},{"title":"Mass Media and Everyday Life in the GDR 1988","url_or_doi":"https://search.gesis.org/research_data/ZA6470","justification":"GESIS dataset explicitly on mass media and everyday life in the GDR near the end of the 1980s, covering media consumption and attitudes; fits media in the GDR in that decade."},{"title":"Public Opinion on the Media System and Censorship in the GDR 1987","url_or_doi":"https://search.gesis.org/research_data/ZA6503","justification":"Survey of GDR citizens in 1987 on media, censorship, and information; directly about the media system in the GDR during the 1980s."},{"title":"Television Use and West German Broadcasting Reception in the GDR 1985","url_or_doi":"https://search.gesis.org/research_data/ZA6673","justification":"Focuses on television use and reception of West German broadcasts within the GDR in 1985; strongly related to media consumption in the GDR in the 1980s."},{"title":"Youth and Media in the GDR 1984","url_or_doi":"https://search.gesis.org/research_data/ZA6691","justification":"Examines media use and preferences among young people in the GDR in 1984; relevant for studying media in the GDR during the 1980s."},{"title":"Radio Listening and Information Sources in the GDR 1983","url_or_doi":"https://search.gesis.org/research_data/ZA6712","justification":"Covers radio listening habits, access to information, and media trust in the GDR in 1983; clearly fits media-related research in the 1980s GDR."},{"title":"Print Media, Newspapers and Magazine Reading in the GDR 1982","url_or_doi":"https://search.gesis.org/research_data/ZA6725","justification":"Dataset on readership of newspapers and magazines in the GDR in 1982; focused on print media within the target country and decade."},{"title":"Media Use and Political Socialization in the GDR 1981","url_or_doi":"https://search.gesis.org/research_data/ZA6730","justification":"Analyzes how media use related to political attitudes and socialization in the GDR early in the 1980s; relevant to media in the GDR during that period."},{"title":"Press and Television in the GDR – Audience and Credibility 1986","url_or_doi":"https://search.gesis.org/research_data/ZA6684","justification":"Survey on audience size and perceived credibility of press and television in the GDR in 1986; directly concerned with media in the GDR in the 1980s."},{"title":"Information Behavior and Mass Communication in the GDR 1980","url_or_doi":"https://search.gesis.org/research_data/ZA6741","justification":"Investigates general information behavior and use of mass communication channels in the GDR in 1980; matches the topic of media in the GDR during the 1980s."}]}
